reply: (1) This is an AutomationDirect GS10 Variable Frequency Drive, used to control the speed of AC motors. (2) The most likely cause is a damaged shaft coupling, which might be preventing the pump from engaging. (3) The tech should check the shaft coupling for damage and replace it if necessary. For an unknown fault, the tech should start by verifying the VFD settings and checking for any visible signs of wear or damage on the motor and pump.
